content.text: GPT image 2.5 is the biggest jump in AI
image generation we've seen in over a
year. Perfect photorealistic human face
generation, advanced lighting and
effects, accurate complex text inside
images, flawless screenshot generation,
and multiple images within an image. In
this deep dive, we're going to walk you
through the real business use cases of
all this, not the hype demos. We'll look
at where it replaces your designer
completely and also where it falls
short. We'll also take a look at the new
Claude design, which is aimed at a
completely different problem. I'm Mark
Webster and my co-host today is Gael
Breton, my co-founder at Authority
Hacker, where we test all this stuff so
you don't have to. So Gael, let's start
by looking at one of the things which
has challenged us when it comes to AI
image generation for the longest time,
and that's YouTube video thumbnails. A
very, very important image and one that

spend days uh creating cuz it's just so
important. Exactly. Up until this point,
AI has not been good, but this is the
absolute turning point. And I want to
show you, start by showing you what is
now possible. So, this
thumbnail, which I think you can agree
is pretty good. Like if you got that
from a professional designer, you'd be
pretty happy.
